# Pooja Packaging Industries

> Pooja Packaging Industries is a leading flexible packaging manufacturer
> based in Delhi, India. Established in 2017, the company specialises in
> custom printed laminated pouches, laminated rolls, standy zipper pouches,
> tubes packaging, mattress bags, and food-grade flexible packaging for FMCG,
> food, pharmaceutical, ayurvedic, cosmetic, mattress, and industrial brands.
> GST registered (07AAGFP3760D1Z8) | IEC certified (AAGFP3760D) | Pan-India supply.

Pooja Packaging Industries manufactures flexible packaging including detergent
pouches, spices pouches, atta and flour bags, rice packaging bags, tea pouches,
snacks packaging pouches, seeds pouches, standy zipper pouches, food packaging,
laminated tubes (ABL & PBL), mattress cover bags, pillow packaging, PU foam
sheet packing, PVC sheets, printed laminated pouches, printed laminated rolls,
multi-purpose aluminium foil, and cello tapes.

Key capabilities: multi-colour custom printing (up to 10 colours),
FSSAI-compliant food-grade materials, low MOQ for startups, bulk supply for
large FMCG brands, matte, gloss and metallic lamination, zipper and spout
closure options, in-house design support, and pan-India delivery.

- Address: G-951 & J-2802, DSIDC Industrial Area, New Delhi - 110040, India
- Phone: +91-9810006555 | +91-9266561910
- Email: poojapackagingindustries951@gmail.com
- GST: 07AAGFP3760D1Z8
- IEC: AAGFP3760D
- Turnover: Upto 5 Cr.
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PoojaPackagingIndustries
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/poojapackagingindustries/

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/): Flexible packaging manufacturer in Delhi — custom pouches, laminated rolls and bags for food, FMCG and industrial brands
- [About](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/about): Company background, GST details, IEC registration, nature of business and manufacturing capabilities
- [Products](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products): Full product catalogue of flexible packaging solutions
- [Blog](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/blogs): Packaging industry insights, tips and product guides
- [Contact Us](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/contact-us): Factory address, phone numbers, email and enquiry form

## Food & FMCG Packaging

- [Detergent Pouch Manufacturer](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/detergent-pouch-manufacturer): Custom laminated pouches for liquid and powder detergents — leak-proof, durable, bulk supply
- [Spices Pouch Manufacturer](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/Spices-pouch-manufacturer): Airtight, printed spice and masala pouches — aluminium foil and BOPP laminated options
- [Atta & Flour Packaging](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/atta-pouch-manufacturer): FSSAI-compliant, heavy-duty BOPP laminated bags for atta, maida, besan and flour brands
- [Rice Packaging](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/rice-packaging): Printed laminated rice bags and pouches in 1kg to 25kg — transparent window options available
- [Tea Packaging](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/tea-packaging): Airtight chai patti packing pouches — readymade and custom printed, wholesale bulk supply
- [Snacks Packaging](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/snacks-packaging): Printed snacks pouches for namkeen, chips, dry fruits and makhana — nitrogen flush compatible
- [Seeds Packaging](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/seeds-packaging): Custom pouches for chia, flax, sunflower and agricultural seeds — eco-friendly kraft options
- [Food Packaging](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/food-packaging): FSSAI-compliant printed and customised pouches for all food product categories

## Speciality Packaging

- [Standy Zipper Pouch](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/standy-zipper-pouch): Resealable stand-up zipper pouches for dry fruits, spices, tea, coffee and health foods
- [Tubes Packaging](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/tubes-packaging): ABL and PBL laminated tubes for cosmetics, pharmaceuticals, ayurvedic and food brands
- [Printed Laminated Pouches](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/printed-laminated-pouches): Brand-ready multi-colour printed flexible pouches for retail FMCG products
- [Printed Laminated Rolls](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/printed-laminated-rolls): Custom laminated rolls for automatic FFS packing machines
- [Multi Purpose Aluminium Foil](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/multi-purpose-aluminium-foil): Barrier aluminium foil packaging for food, pharma and industrial applications
- [Cello Tapes](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/cello-tapes): Packaging and sealing tapes for bundling and carton sealing

## Protective & Industrial Packaging

- [Mattress Packaging](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/mattress): LDPE mattress bags and covers for all mattress sizes — single, double, queen and king
- [Pillow Packaging](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/pillow): Custom printed LDPE pillow cover bags for mattress brands and e-commerce sellers
- [PU Foam Sheet Packing](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/pu-foam-sheet-packing): Protective LDPE packaging for foam sheets, mattress rolls and cushion products
- [PVC Sheet](https://www.poojapackagingindustries.com/products/pvc-sheet): Transparent and printed PVC packaging sheets for mattress, garment and industrial use
